title: Dashing Australian Teque Os Fritters
description: Indulge in these buttery and shattering teque os fritters, made with pre-fried teque os, dashi-extract and paleo-friendly ingredients, perfect for a weeknight dinner.
instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of sesame oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
Heat 1 tablespoon of sesame oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
Cook the pre-fried Teque Os for 2-3 minutes on each side, or until golden brown.
Transfer the cooked Teque Os to a plate.
Add 1 tablespoon of unsalted butter to the skillet and melt over medium heat.
Whisk in the dashi-extract and cook for 1 minute, or until fragrant.
Stir in the chopped scallions and cook for 1 minute, or until softened.
Add the beaten egg to the skillet and scramble until cooked through.
To assemble the fritters, place a spoonful of the egg mixture onto each Teque Os and serve immediately.
